user_system_path: Foundation so the first indispensable R1 card fires (#567). Three code moves: observability (pipeline_runs into seed-from-scorer-core), ghost-goal gate (extractDrift vocabulary check), doctrine (FOLDERA_MASTER_BIBLE Part VI). allowed_files_raw: Allow-by-default-minus-forbidden (friction reduction, owner-directed 2026-06-22). The real guard is forbidden_file_patterns + the proof doctrine, not a whitelist.
forbidden_files_raw: HARD RAILS: No Stripe, Scout (lib/scout — the outward R6 rung re-enters only behind owner sign-off + new anti-fabrication guardrails), schema/migration, or secrets changes. No auto-send. No BLIND loosening of positive_winner_contract or the discrepancy-card quality gate — every gate change carries a test + before/after read. R1's own-activity carve-out is additive (does not weaken the external-entity requirement for any other class).
required_local_proof: npm run gate:continuity && npm run typecheck; npx vitest run lib/briefing lib/workday-presence (baseline 1014 green, plus new R1 + Tier-2-gate tests)
required_browser_proof: Live (owner): a fresh own-activity thread (email_sent / file_modified) for 2cbc1bab produces a directive (not do_nothing) of next-move/finished shape that lands in Slack with a workday_presence_slack_send receipt in tkg_actions.
browser_proof_command: manual: replay a fresh email_sent/file_modified signal for 2cbc1bab through the engine; confirm directive shape + seeded=true + Slack card + receipt.
acceptance_condition: gate:continuity green + vitest green (baseline + new tests) + PR merged + live own-activity act delivered with a persisted receipt for 2cbc1bab.
anti_regression_checks: no edits under app/api/stripe, lib/scout, supabase/migrations
vitest green (lib/briefing + lib/workday-presence) — 2 new ghost-goal gate tests pass
ghost-goal gate is additive — only blocks vocabulary-dark goals, does not touch other drift conditions
pipeline_runs funnel write is best-effort (void; never throws into callers)
no loosening of any existing quality gate; no auto-send
stop_condition: PR merged for claude/issue-567-al9edy; pipeline_runs has traceable rows after delivery trigger; no ghost-goal drift card in trace.
